hero.sub: We produce ultra-high-quality video content and animations that capture the essence of your brand and tell your story to the world.

video.p: From pre-production to post-production, we craft every type of professional video content.

cgi.p: 3D modelling, fluid animations and photorealistic rendering for every creative need.

ads.p: High-impact advertising creations that speak to your audience and drive conversions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We transform your vision into reality with impactful video and CGI. Discover how we can help you stand out in the digital market.
mission.q1: What is the video production process?
mission.a1: We follow a professional workflow from concept creation to post-production, ensuring quality and fast delivery times.
mission.a2: Yes, we deliver complete 3D animation solutions for any creative need, from modelling to final rendering.

game.p: Learn to create professional games using the most advanced engines.

vfx.p: Master advanced visual effects and color grading techniques.

vp.p: Explore the future of production with virtual reality and LED walls.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I start a project with you?
faq.a1: Contact us via the form, share your vision, and we'll schedule a call to understand your needs and timeline.
faq.a2: Times vary based on project complexity. We always provide a detailed quote with a timeline.
faq.q3: Do you offer revisions during the process?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Including revisions and feedback in our process is key to achieving the perfect result.
faq.q4: How can I learn more about pricing?
faq.a4: Contact us for a free consultation and a personalised quote.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.sub: Transform your vision into reality. Let's talk about your project.

team.hero_p: We are artists, technicians and storytellers. We combine creativity and technology to shape the future of digital production.
team.ale_bio: A 3D Artist and Animator dedicated to transforming ideas into powerful visual stories. Skilled in CGI, motion, and digital storytelling, with a passion for creating cinematic worlds.
team.edo_bio: Tech Artist and Unreal Engine Specialist blending creativity and technical precision. Focused on virtual production, real-time environments and high-impact digital visuals.
team.gio_bio: A VFX Supervisor and Compositor with a sharp eye for detail and visual coherence. Experienced in crafting seamless effects, supervising pipelines, and elevating shots through advanced compositing.
team.amati_bio: Filmmaker and director with a diploma in directing, editing and cinematography. He brings a sharp cinematic eye to every set, built across short films, commercials and character-driven video productions.
team.chad_bio: Manages Filmwaker's digital presence across social platforms, handling content, editorial strategy and community. He turns every production into social-first storytelling that connects with audiences.
team.pasini_bio: Software developer and technical instructor with hands-on experience in programming and teaching. At Filmwaker Academy he guides students through coding, logic and development tools applied to creative production.

portfolio.title: Our Latest Works
portfolio.hero_p: We don't just produce video. We solve creative problems. Here's how we work.
portfolio.p1_p1: The goal was to create a realistic sci-fi environment without building an expensive physical set. We used LED wall technology to fully immerse the actor in the scene.
portfolio.p1_p2: We developed the 3D environment in Unreal Engine 5, optimising it for real-time rendering. On set, we managed camera tracking to sync the background perspective with the operator's movements.
portfolio.p2_p1: The client needed to communicate company values through an interview that felt empathetic and cinematic rather than cold or institutional.
portfolio.p2_p2: We focused on cinematography and direction. Soft lighting, intimate mood, rhythmic editing and colour grading elevated the perceived quality of the brand.
portfolio.p3_p1: The goal was a product reveal video showing internal details and mechanical movements impossible to film in real life.
portfolio.p3_p2: Photorealistic models and textures, mechanical animations synced to music, and virtual studio lighting to highlight shapes and metallic surfaces.

academy.hero_title:
Learn from professionals.
Create at the highest level.
academy.hero_sub: Practical courses on Unreal Engine, VFX and Virtual Production taught by people who work on set every day.
academy.why_1_p: Our teachers work in production every day. No theory: real tools, real workflows.
academy.why_2_p: On-demand lessons available 24/7. Rewatch them as many times as you like, on any device.
academy.why_3_p: Every teacher is reachable for questions even after the course ends. You are never alone.
academy.why_4_p: Each course awards a completion certificate you can add to your CV and LinkedIn profile.
academy.final_cta_sub: Choose your course and start building the skills the industry demands.

courses.hero_sub: Our courses are led by industry professionals who guide you step by step toward practical, market-ready skills.
courses.inc_cert_p: At the end of the course you receive a certificate to add to your CV.
courses.inc_pace_p: On-demand lessons, watch whenever you want.
courses.inc_support_p: Help with any question during and after the course.
courses.inc_assets_p: Assets, finished projects and support resources.
courses.inc_realwork_p: Hands-on exercises using real footage from professional sets.
courses.inc_studio_p: Optional practical sessions at our studio.
courses.game_card_p: From game design to programming, discover all the secrets of modern game development with Unreal Engine.
courses.vfx_card_p: Compositing, colour grading, particle effects. Master advanced VFX techniques for cinematic productions.
courses.vp_card_p: LED walls, real-time rendering, motion capture. Explore the future of production with immersive virtual environments.
courses.game_ch1_p: Interface overview, content browser, viewport navigation and initial project settings.
courses.game_ch2_p: Landscape tools, foliage, geometry brushes and all advanced editing modes.
courses.game_ch3_p: Creating realistic environments with Megascans, Nanite and Lumen for dynamic lighting.
courses.game_ch4_p: Game logic, input management, Blueprint communication and introduction to C++.
courses.game_ch5_p: Final optimisation, project packaging and distribution to target platforms.
courses.game_li1: Workflow and complete game creation in Unreal Engine
courses.game_li2: Blueprint programming and introduction to C++
courses.game_li3: Blueprint best practices: optimisation, memory, structure
courses.game_li6: Debugging and building the final application
courses.vfx_ch1_p: Colour theory, visual psychology and overview of the main VFX software.
courses.vfx_ch2_p: Layering, masking, keying and advanced techniques in After Effects and Nuke.
courses.vfx_ch3_p: Camera tracking, object tracking and frame-by-frame rotoscoping techniques.
courses.vfx_ch4_p: Professional colour correction in DaVinci Resolve, LUTs and cinematic looks.
courses.vfx_ch5_p: Codecs, broadcast formats, delivery pipelines for web, cinema and broadcast.
courses.vfx_li2: Advanced compositing with After Effects and Nuke
courses.vfx_li5: Cinematic colour grading with DaVinci Resolve
courses.vfx_li7: Export and delivery workflow in various formats
courses.vp_ch1_p: History, current technologies, differences between in-camera VFX and post-production VFX.
courses.vp_ch2_p: Hardware setup, display calibration, colour management and on-set troubleshooting.
courses.vp_ch3_p: nDisplay, real-time rendering, VP optimisation and Perforce pipeline.
courses.vp_ch4_p: Optical motion capture, live link, retargeting and integration with 3D characters.
courses.vp_ch5_p: Virtual set coordination, real camera tracking and delivery of captured material.
courses.vp_li1: LED wall technologies and professional hardware setup
courses.vp_li6: Virtual lighting and advanced illumination techniques
courses.vp_li7: Case studies from high-end film productions
courses.vp_li8: Full workflow from pre-production to final delivery
courses.game_lead: Learn Unreal Engine and all the skills needed to build your own game, even starting from absolute zero.
courses.vfx_lead: Master advanced VFX techniques. From compositing to colour grading, create cinematic effects that transform your scenes.
courses.vp_lead: Explore the future of production with virtual environments and LED walls. Manage virtual sets, real-time rendering and immersive technologies.
courses.instr_bio_game: Professionals with years of experience on indie titles and commercial productions. Available for questions even after the course ends.
courses.instr_bio_vfx: Post-production experts with backgrounds in advertising and cinema. Direct support throughout your entire learning journey.
courses.instr_bio_vp: Supervisors with hands-on experience on LED wall sets and Unreal Engine pipelines. Practical knowledge of every stage of the workflow.
